figures.caption: Table 4: Performance of the proposed method on the GWFSS Dataset for wheat organ segmentation.
Table 3: Comparison of wheat organ segmentation performance on the OSD dataset.
Table 2: Comparison of segmentation performance between the competitive methods and our proposed method.
Figure 1: Framework illustration of Semantic-Geometric Prior Synergization. See §3 for more details.
Figure 2: Qualitative comparison for segmentation results. The first two rows present segmentation results on EFDV2, while the third row shows segmentation results on GWFSS.
Figure 3: Visualization of point prompts across different samples. The first, second, and third rows correspond to EFDV2, OSD, and GWFSS, respectively. Best viewed with zoom.
